title: Skaak Tippers

{{Quote|The Skaak Tippers are brewing up some trouble.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panaka]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TTo">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|The Tip-off|Naboo}}</ref>}}
The '''Skaak Tippers''' were a gang of renegade computer [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] active on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
{{Quote|More Skaak Tippers. Ugh.|A spacer, to [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]]|<ref name="SWG:RtGAsbtST" />}}
The Skaak Tippers, who dealt in illegal trade of information, ripping of bank account and other acts of computer network crime, had several inspirations for the name of their organization. The "Tipper" part obviously was derived from the monicker of their leader. The "sk" in "Skaak" was inspired by the [[SK]] unit of measure for computer data, while "aak" was inspired by the ferocious [[Akk dog/Legends|aak dogs]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. The name was meant to give the impression that the Skaak Tipers were a pack of vicious computer hackers.<ref name="CDHZ" />

==History==
{{Quote|They plan to hack into them and gain access to the bank accounts of everyone in Kaadara.|Colonel Panaka, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:Ttb" />}}
The Skaak Tippers were formed by a mysterious [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] known only as the "[[Tipper]]." He took that monicker because he would "tip" the contents of other people's bank account into his own.<ref name="CDHZ" />

[[File:Skaak_Tippers.jpg|thumb|left|A Skaak Tipper.]]
By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Skaak Tippers were considered by the [[RSF Intelligence Division]] as one of the four major criminal groups on Naboo, along with the [[Mummers]], the [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire]] and the [[Darkwalkers]].<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" /> The Skaak Tippers had hostile relationships with Borvo's organization<ref name="SWG:EHB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Everyone Hates Borvo|Naboo}}</ref> and the Darkwalkers.<ref name="SWG:DSTDW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Doing Skaak Tipper Dirty Work|Naboo}}</ref>

When the gang started to cut into the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] business of [[Radeld Siwar]] on Naboo, Siwar sent a young smuggler to deal with the problem. The smuggler ambushed and killed several gang members near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] to send the gang a message.<ref name="SWG:WfR">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Smuggler|Working for Radeld|Naboo}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Skaak Tippers invaded the [[Old war bunker]] near [[Kaadara]], a research facility used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] to learn more about the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] by the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. In the meantime, RSF [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panaka]] started to investigate the Skaak Tippers. He dispatched [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Willoc]] to the old war bunker and a spacer to [[Confiscation of Skaak Tipper weapons crates|confiscate]] Skaak Tipper weapons crates near the [[Skaak Tipper Compound]].<ref name="SWG:TTo" /> Royal Naboo Security Forces agents discovered that the Tippers were planning to steal all bank terminals from all over Kaadara.<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /><ref name="Card-SWGTCG-Tipping the Balance">{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=Tipping the Balance}}</ref> However, the Skaak Tippers suffered a major setback when RSF agents killed one of their leaders, [[Jonni Skaak]], during the [[Raid on the Skaak Tipper Hideout|assault]] of the [[Skaak Tipper Hideout]].<ref name="SWG:Ttb" />

In the meantime, the Skaak Tippers and Darkwalkers blackmailed [[Hugo Eckener/Legends|Hugo Eckener]], the father of the indebted [[Karl Eckener]], to force him to hire spacers in order to attack [[Borvo Bunker]].<ref name="SWG:EHB" /> Skaak Tipper [[Toff Henrou]] later ordered the spacers to attack the [[Darkwalker Cave (Theed)|Darkwalker Cave]]<ref name="SWG:DSTDW" /> while the Darkwalker [[Jorgellansel]] ordered them to attack the [[Skaak Tipper Compound]].<ref name="SWG:DDD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Doing Darkwalker Deeds|Naboo}}</ref>

Soon thereafter, the wanted murderer [[Hunnos Jarkey]] briefly took refuge in the Skaak Tipper Compound after he escaped the Royal Naboo Security Forces.<ref name="SWG:CtEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Catch the Escaped Murderer|Naboo}}</ref>

Later, [[Tanoa Vills]] dispatched a spacer to the [[Skaak Tipper Cave]], in the [[Gallo Mountains/Legends|Gallo Mountains]], in order to get [[octave regulator]]s from Skaak Tipper machinists.<ref name="SWG:GtPfaS" />

A few time later, the Skaak Tippers operating from the [[Skaak Tipper Bunker]] in the [[Lasay Swamp]] stole a valuable [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] artifact. [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] thus sent a spacer to recover the artifact in the bunker. After killing [[Tomi Skaak]], the leader of the bunker, the spacer discovered that the artifact had been moved to the Skaak Tipper Cave in the Gallo Mountains. The spacer went to the cave and finally killed [[Dee Skaak]] to recover the Gungan artifact.<ref name="SWG:RtGAsbtST" />
